headline: VET YOUR GMP AUDITOR
subheading: The 10 questions on competence, independence and rigour that protect your compliance.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking the rigorous vetting of a pharmaceutical GMP audit consultant: a glowing magnifying lens hovering over a layered grid of translucent document cards and check-marked clipboards, beams of light passing through to reveal a clean stainless-steel manufacturing surface and frosted cleanroom glass below, a precision balance scale rendered as fine luminous linework symbolising independence and objective judgement, subtle interlocking shield and audit-trail motifs, deep navy background dissolving into atmospheric shadow, teal and cyan light refracting through glass and lens, a single fresh-green accent glinting along a polished edge, shallow depth of field with soft premium bokeh, calm authority and forensic scrutiny, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
